T0050.title: Naked Application
T0050.definition: A method of applying for a credit card by submitting only the application form without providing any additional supporting documents, such as proof of assets or income. This term is commonly used in loan application scenarios.
T0050.description: A method of applying for a credit card by submitting only the application form without providing any additional supporting documents, such as proof of assets or income. This term is commonly used in loan application scenarios.
